response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse engineering roles, but lacks proven experience in IT consulting, architectural design documentation (e.g., UML), and client-facing advisory work — and his German is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven leadership across high-scale engineering teams at Stripe and Shopify
Strong full-stack versatility with deep Linux, Docker, and DevOps infrastructure experience
concerns: German proficiency is listed as 'Basic' — does not meet minimum C1 requirement
No evidence of UML, requirements management, or formal IT architecture design documentation
Lacks demonstrated experience in IT consulting, client advisory, or project scoping for external clients
